text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the start of Narita Taishin's journey
to take on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To show off her amazing final sprint, and to get
the better of all those who underestimate her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We must first work together towards her debut.
